jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at NIIT
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at NIIT. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Kolkata-based team.

About NIIT:
NIIT is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT!
